---
title: "Unit 1 Project, Report 1"
format: html
editor: visual
---

#### Data

```{r}
install.packages("tidytuesdayR")
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2024-11-05')
```

#### Data Context

#### Cleaning

#### Two Research Questions (this Data)

#### Two Research Questions (Supplemental Data)

#### Two Visualizations
